Narrative: The Khavda Renewable Energy Park has successfully produced 13363172.5 MW of renewable energy over the reporting period.
Operations experienced 3 high-risk weather days, resulting in potential generation losses.
The facility continues to drive massive decarbonization, avoiding 63555248.68 Tons of CO2 equivalent emissions.
